hero.heading: Visuals That Perform
hero.subheading: Rexora Media is a premier digital agency specializing in high-end video production, performance marketing, and full-service creative solutions.

content.introHeadline: Rexora Media turns strategy into visuals that perform.
content.introText: Rexora Media is a premier digital agency specializing in high-end video production, performance marketing, and full-service creative solutions. From strategy to execution, we make visuals that perform.
content.scaleHeadline: Digital growth, creative production, and execution under one roof.
content.scaleText: We connect social media management, paid ads, brand strategy, websites, reels, VFX, motion graphics, and premium design into one growth-focused creative system.
content.footerHeadline: Ready to grow with Rexora Media?
content.footerText: Message us on WhatsApp or Instagram and tell us what you want to build next.

founder.name: Aditya Kittad
founder.bio: Aditya leads Rexora Media with a focus on performance-led creativity, premium visuals, and digital growth systems for modern brands. His work connects strategy, production, and distribution so every visual has a clear business purpose.

services.title: Social Media Management
services.description: Content calendars, brand voice, publishing systems, community direction, and platform-native creative planning.

services.title: Performance Marketing
services.description: Growth funnels, campaign strategy, creative testing, conversion planning, and performance-focused reporting.

services.title: Paid Ads Management
services.description: Meta and Google ad management, campaign setup, targeting, optimization, and high-performing ad creatives.

services.title: Brand Strategy
services.description: Positioning, visual direction, messaging, launch strategy, and creative systems built for stronger recall.

services.title: Website Development
services.description: Premium landing pages, business websites, conversion flows, responsive design, and scalable web experiences.

services.title: Video Production
services.description: High-end ad films, launch videos, event coverage, product shoots, founder stories, and cinematic edits.

services.title: Reels & Short-Form Content
services.description: Scroll-stopping reels, hooks, creator-style edits, trend formats, and social-first content packages.

services.title: Motion Graphics & Animation
services.description: Animated explainers, typography systems, logo motion, title cards, and dynamic campaign visuals.

services.title: VFX & Special Effects
services.description: Premium effects, cleanup, compositing, transitions, cinematic polish, and visual enhancement for videos.

services.title: Graphic Design & Branding
services.description: Brand identity, posters, social creatives, packaging direction, campaign visuals, and visual systems.

testimonials.quote: Rexora turned scattered ideas into one premium launch system. The film, edits, and graphics finally felt like one brand.
testimonials.name: Founder

testimonials.quote: The team understood pace. Strategy, shoot, design, and delivery moved without losing the cinematic quality.
testimonials.name: Marketing Lead

testimonials.quote: They helped us show up consistently with content that felt polished, current, and genuinely ours.
testimonials.name: Creator

contact.whatsappMessage: Hello Rexora Media, I want to know more about your services.
